title: Damine
description: Damine is a performance-friendly modpack by me, featuring beautiful shaders, a minimap, 3D resource packs, and much more. For lower-end PCs, try Damine Optimized for even smoother gameplay.
body:
**damine** is a carefully curated modpack created by **Dave**, aimed at players who want the best of both worlds: smooth performance and visual flair. Instead of spending hours handpicking and configuring mods, Damine gives you a plug-and-play experience with everything already set up.

What’s inside?

•	Top-tier performance mods to keep your game fast and stable

•	Visual upgrades like Complementary Shaders and enhanced animations to make your world come alive

•	Helpful features such as a minimap, world map, and fast loading tools that streamline gameplay

Damine focuses on making Minecraft more enjoyable without losing its charm. Whether you’re building, exploring, or just surviving, this pack makes it all easier and better-looking.

Running on a lower-end PC? No worries — try **damine optimized**, a lightweight version with the same feel but less strain on your system.
